zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Gaylord of Pitminster於1525年出生在英國薩默塞特比特明斯特時，他的父親Nicholas Gaylord26歲，母親Johanne Bickman24歲。他和Joan Brixton Sevenoak至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1546年4月8日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特比特明斯特享年21歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特比特明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Gaylord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern, of Norman origin): variant of Gaylard altered by folk etymology, from the Old French and Middle English personal name Gaillart, Gallard, Galliard, representing either the ancient Germanic personal name Gailhard (composed of elements meaning ‘powerful, lusty, cheerful’ + ‘hard, firm, resilient, strong’) or Old French gaillard, gaillart ‘vigorous, powerful, strong’. Alternatively, from Middle English gaillard, galiard ‘brave, strong, valiant’, also ‘lively, gay, gaily dressed’.
Altered form of Gaylard, itself an Anglicized form of French Gaillard , which was brought to England by the Huguenots.
In some cases also an Americanized form of French   Gaillard  .

variants.name: Gaillard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Philippe, Pierre, Andre, Andree, Ketly, Marcel, Mirlande, Monique.
French: nickname from gaillard ‘vigorous, strong’ (ultimately from Celtic galia ‘strength’). This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Gailhard, composed of the elements gail ‘powerful, lusty, cheerful’ + hard ‘hard, strong’.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Gaylord of Pitminster was born in 1525, in Pitminster, Somerset, England, his father, Nicholas Gaylord, was 26 and his mother, Johanne Bickman, was 24. He had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Joan Brixton Sevenoak. He died on 8 April 1546, in Pitminster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 21, and was buried in Pitminster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Gaylord of Pitminster est né en 1525, à Pitminster, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Gaylord, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Johanne Bickman, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Joan Brixton Sevenoak. Il est décédé le 8 avril 1546, à Pitminster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 21 ans, et a été enterré à Pitminster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Gaylord of Pitminster 1525 in Pitminster, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Gaylord 26 und seine Mutter Johanne Bickman 24. Er hatte mit Joan Brixton Sevenoak mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. April 1546 im Alter von 21 Jahren in Pitminster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Pitminster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Gaylord of Pitminster è nato il nel 1525 nel Pitminster, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Gaylord, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Johanne Bickman, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Joan Brixton Sevenoak. Morì il 8 aprile 1546, nel Pitminster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 21 anni, e fu sepolto a Pitminster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Gaylord of Pitminster(이)가 1525년 영국 서머세트 피트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Gaylord(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanne Bickman(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Joan Brixton Sevenoak(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1546년 4월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 피트민스터에서 21세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 피트민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Gaylord of Pitminster nasceu em 1525, em Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Gaylord, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Johanne Bickman, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Joan Brixton Sevenoak. Ele faleceu em 8 de abril de 1546, em Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 21 anos, e foi sepultado em Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Gaylord of Pitminster родился в 1525 г. в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Gaylord было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanne Bickman, 24. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Joan Brixton Sevenoak. Он умер 8 апреля 1546 г. в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 21 год и был похоронен в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Gaylord of Pitminster nació en 1525, en Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Gaylord, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Johanne Bickman, tenía 24 años. Murió el 8 de abril de 1546, en Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 21 años, y fue sepultado en Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
